title: Playground Debug Browser
concept: A browser-chrome redesign for support engineers that treats every Playground as a tab, keeps the WordPress address bar and save state central, and exposes creation, saved sites, Site Manager tools, gallery browsing, and exports through side drawers.
focus: high-contrast black, white, and cyan palette
flows: Start a new browser tab from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, or pinned Blueprint
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with file-copy progress
Manage unsaved and saved Playgrounds, including rename and delete actions
Use Site Manager drawers for settings, file browser, Blueprint editing, database tools, and logs
Browse and filter the full Blueprint gallery
Export to GitHub, download the Playground as a zip, or download database.sqlite
featureCoverage: Blueprint gallery search and category filters
Destructive reset and saved reload behavior
File browser create file, create folder, upload, browse, and code editor
Blueprint file browser, copy link, download bundle, run, and JSON editor
Database driver, path, size, download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty state
